description_long: This is a medium-sized, freestanding shelving unit with a rectangular form and four sturdy legs for support. The front and back panels feature a series of horizontal shelves, each divided into smaller cubby-like compartments, ideal for organizing or storing items. The sides are solid, with one side appearing completely opaque and the other showing the open cubby structure. The interior is dark, suggesting a wood or laminate material, while the exterior has a reddish-brown and black color scheme. The legs are metallic and adjustable, providing stability on uneven surfaces. This unit is suitable for use in garages, workshops, or urban public spaces for storage or organization.
description: A rectangular, freestanding shelving unit with multiple cubby compartments and four metal legs, finished in reddish-brown and black tones. It is designed for organized storage in urban environments.
description_view_0: Front view showing multiple horizontal shelves divided into cubby compartments, with two visible metal legs.
description_view_1: Open back view revealing the depth of the shelves and cubbies, with the interior structure clearly visible.
description_view_2: Side view displaying a solid panel with no visible openings or compartments, and two metal legs.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing a mostly solid, dark panel with minimal detail, and two metal legs.
